description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a black fence and featuring a spacious, landscaped yard. The house has a combination of flat and gable roofs in dark gray, with multiple large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front yard includes a driveway, a double garage, and a manicured lawn with shrubs and a blossoming tree. The backyard is equipped with a patio area, outdoor seating, a hammock, and a small wooden playhouse, as well as a covered barbecue or dining area. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and fence. The property is well-organized, with clear pathways, garden beds, and a mix of open green spaces and functional outdoor zones.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with dark gable and flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a black fence. Features include a driveway, garage, patio, playhouse, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, manicured lawn, shrubs, and a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage doors, side lawn, and the transition from front to backyard with visible playhouse and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, hammock, outdoor seating, large glass doors, and playhouse.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, playhouse, patio, and the side of the house with visible rooflines and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors on rear facade
